channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: US-Israeli war on Iran will push 30 million back into poverty, UN warns
item.description: Disruption to fuel and fertiliser supplies due to the Strait of Hormuz closure will hit crop yields, UNDP chief warns.

item.title: Journalist recalls Israeli strike killing Amal Khalil in southern Lebanon
item.description: Journalist Zainab Faraj recalled the final moments of fellow journalist Amal Khalil.

item.title: Lebanon Latest: Israel attacks kill journalist and target first responders
item.description: A fragile ceasefire holds as Israeli strikes kill a journalist and target first responders in Lebanon.

item.title: US to ‘shoot and kill’ Iranian boats laying mines in Hormuz, Trump says
item.description: US says it intercepted another tanker carrying Iranian oil as Trump underscores alleged infighting within Iran's leadership.

item.title: How Iran war has triggered soaring cost of medicines
item.description: Pharmacists in some countries have seen the cost of painkillers more than quadruple.

item.title: How Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil was pursued and killed by Israel
item.description: Details of how Lebanese journalist Amal Khalil was “pursued” and killed by Israeli forces have been released.

item.title: Makan Nasiri, the only child still missing from the school bombed in Iran
item.description: After nearly seven weeks of searching for remains, authorities tell the seven-year-old's parents his case is closed.

item.title: Infiltration from Within: Israelis recruited to spy for enemy countries
item.description: Israel’s intelligence exposed - spies, moles and blind spots from early betrayals to October 7 and the war with Iran.

item.title: Protester hurls red fluid at Reza Pahlavi during Germany visit
item.description: The exiled former crown prince of Iran Reza Pahlavi was splashed with red fluid by an activist during a visit to Berlin.

item.title: How has Hezbollah shifted its battle tactics?
item.description: Hezbollah’s change of weapons and tactics
